name: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 6.875% Series J Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated is a regional bank holding company. It offers a range of financial services including commercial banking, consumer banking, mortgage banking, and wealth management. Huntington Bancshares is headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, USA.
